calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. Valerie Papale.
Petitioner,Jesus Martinez present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Jessica Garcia Martinez.
Decree signed in open court.
